lines.lyric_translation: If there is a God of Music
I want to give you a hug of gratitude
A universal language

lines.lyric_hangul: 자음과 모음이 달라도 상관없는 건 music
lines.lyric_translation: Different alphabets, but no matter / as long as there’s music
We can’t communicate with words, but with music
We can be best friends from now on

lines.lyric_hangul: 너와 내가 모르는 사이여도 춤출 수 있어
lines.lyric_translation: We’ve just met but / we can dance together

lines.lyric_hangul: We can mix it up right, sugar and spice, brass sound and guitar
lines.lyric_translation: We can mix it up right / Sugar and spice / Brass sound and guitar

parts.lyric: We can mix it up right

lines.lyric_translation: Anything with four syllables, they say it’s my name
Kung chi pak chi, is that my name, too?
Is this sound also for me?

lines.lyric_hangul: Kick snare, drum bass, piano, bass line
lines.lyric_translation: Kick snare / Drum bass / Piano / Bassline

lines.lyric_hangul: 무엇이 우리의 행복인가? 뭐 있나? 춤을 춰 노래하자
lines.lyric_translation: What is our happiness / Don’t fret, let’s just dance and sing

lines.lyric_hangul: 이것이 우리의 행복이다 (다시 한번 더, hey)
lines.lyric_translation: This is our happiness / One more time, hey

lines.lyric_hangul: 음악은 우리의 숨이니까 위험하지 않아, 계속 들이키자
lines.lyric_translation: Music is our breath / No danger here, keep taking it in
Everybody, let’s listen up
If there is a God of Music
This is a message for you
Gather one note after the other mhm-
Dance and sing, this feels amazing

lines.lyric: Kung chi pak chi kung kung chi pak chi ye
lines.lyric_hangul: 쿵 치, 팍 치, 쿵쿵 치, 팍 치, 예
lines.lyric_translation: Kung chi pak chi kung kung chi pak chi yeah

lines.lyric: Kung chi pak chi kung kung chi pak chi ye
lines.lyric_hangul: 쿵 치, 팍 치, 쿵쿵 치, 팍 치, 예
lines.lyric_translation: Kung chi pak chi kung kung chi pak chi yeah

lines.lyric: Kung chi pak chi kung kung chi pak chi ye
lines.lyric_hangul: 쿵 치, 팍 치, 쿵쿵 치, 팍 치, 예
lines.lyric_translation: Kung chi pak chi kung kung chi pak chi yeah
Happiness is now
Think about it, even noise is music to us
We each live by our own boom and pow
Even the ants’ footsteps march in harmony

lines.lyric_hangul: 무엇이 우리의 행복인가? 뭐 있나? 춤을 춰 노래하자
lines.lyric_translation: Don’t fret, let’s just dance and sing

lines.lyric_hangul: 이것이 우리의 행복이다 (다시 한번 더, hey)
lines.lyric_translation: This is our happiness / One more time, hey

lines.lyric_hangul: 음악은 우리의 숨이니까 위험하지 않아, 계속 들이키자
lines.lyric_translation: Music is our breath / No danger here, keep taking it in
Everybody, let’s listen up
If there is a God of Music
This is a message for you
Gather every single note mhm-
Dance and sing, this feels amazing

lines.lyric_translation: Kung chi pak chi kung kung chi pak chi yeah

lines.lyric_hangul: 쿵 치, 팍 치, 쿵쿵 치, 팍 치, 예
lines.lyric_translation: Kung chi pak chi kung kung chi pak chi yeah

lines.lyric: Kung chi pak chi kung kung chi pak chi ye
lines.lyric_hangul: 쿵 치, 팍 치, 쿵쿵 치, 팍 치, 예
lines.lyric_translation: Kung chi pak chi kung kung chi pak chi yeah
If there is a God of Music
SEVENTEEN to the world
The whole world sing in unison
